# Refractive

> Refractive is a senior-operator ecommerce growth partner for DTC brands, covering strategy, paid media, creative, conversion, retention, and measurement.

Canonical site: https://refractive.co/
XML sitemap: https://refractive.co/sitemap.xml
HTML sitemap: https://refractive.co/sitemap.html
Contact: growth@refractive.co

## Preferred discovery pages
- https://refractive.co/ :: Refractive — One Growth Team. Every Channel. No Excuses. — Refractive replaces your agency stack with a single senior team that owns paid, creative, site, email, and measurement. All coordinated. All accountable.
- https://refractive.co/solutions.html :: Solutions | Full-Stack eCommerce Growth Partner | Refractive — Four pillars that compound growth: Foundation, Growth, Experience, and Retention—powered by Illuminate™ measurement.
- https://refractive.co/illuminate.html :: Illuminate™ | Attribution + Incrementality + MMM for eCommerce | Refractive — Illuminate™ turns scattered marketing data into confident decisions. Attribution, incrementality testing, and media mix modeling—built for eCommerce brands.
- https://refractive.co/playbooks.html :: Playbooks & Templates — Refractive — Operator-built tools and frameworks for DTC growth. Free calculators and gated dashboards built from real programs.
- https://refractive.co/blog/index.html :: The Refractive Index — Operator Frameworks for DTC Growth | Refractive — Operator-level marketing frameworks, playbooks, and contrarian thinking for DTC brands. Written by senior operators who run these programs for real brands, right now.
- https://refractive.co/about.html :: About — Refractive — We're a growth partner built by former in-house operators. Fewer clients, deeper work, measurable outcomes.
- https://refractive.co/how-we-work.html :: How We Work — Refractive — How Refractive Works: The system, cadence, pod, and deliverables.

## Topic coverage
- Ecommerce growth strategy
- Paid media and creative systems
- Shopify conversion and site performance
- Email, SMS, and retention programs
- Attribution, incrementality, MMM, and marketing measurement
- Operator frameworks, calculators, and growth tools

## Crawling notes
- Public marketing pages, blog posts, and open tools are intended for discovery.
- Protected portal, investor, app, and download paths are not intended for open crawling.
- For the complete public URL list, use the XML sitemap.
